//: Config for the autonomous SOLVER worker (worker/solver.mjs). Copy this to worker/solver.config.json (gitignored — paths are host-specific) and fill in `checkouts`. convexUrl may be left empty — the solver falls back to VITE_CONVEX_URL in ../.env.local. Override the checkout map via the REVIEWLOOP_SOLVER_CHECKOUTS env var (JSON). Other env: REVIEWLOOP_CONVEX_URL, CLAUDE_BIN.
//checkouts: Map each watched `owner/name` to a REAL, configured local checkout the solver may build in. Use DEDICATED solver-owned clones, not your personal ones: the reviewloop-feature worktree symlinks node_modules back to the parent, so a solve doing `npm install` would mutate your deps, and stale worktrees would litter a repo you use. One-time setup per repo: `gh repo clone <slug> <path> && cd <path> && npm install && cp <your-clone>/.env.local .env.local`. A leading ~ is expanded. Slugs are matched case-insensitively. A ready-for-agent issue on a repo with no entry here is claimed and FAILED with a clear reason (never silently stalled).
